laws.title: New York Enacts Opioid Antagonist Requirements for Employers
laws.summary:
New York Enacts Opioid Antagonist Requirements for Employers 
 New York recently enacted legislation that will soon require employers that are federally mandated to maintain workplace first aid supplies to include an opioid antagonist, such as Naloxone or Narcan. The original bill, Senate Bill S5922‑A, was enacted on December 13, 2025, and added Labor Law §   27‑f, mandating that all employers sub… [This entry was auto-pulled from Littler.
